subtitle: Technical deep-dives, lessons learned, and perspectives on building for the modern web.

articles.title: Building a Neural Network Particle System with Three.js
articles.excerpt: A deep dive into creating an interactive WebGL particle visualization with dynamic connections, mouse-reactive camera parallax, and color-mode awareness — all running at 60fps.

articles.title: Micro-Frontend Architecture at Scale with Nuxt 3
articles.excerpt: How we decomposed a monolithic Vue app into independently deployable micro-frontends, maintained shared state, and achieved sub-second page loads across 4 global brands.

articles.title: Advanced GSAP Timelines: Beyond Simple Tweens
articles.excerpt: Master complex animation orchestration — nested timelines, ScrollTrigger scrub, character-by-character reveals, and spring-physics easing for production UI.

articles.title: Design Systems That Actually Scale
articles.excerpt: Lessons from building component libraries that serve multiple brands — token architecture, theming strategy, and the art of useful abstractions without over-engineering.

articles.title: TypeScript Patterns for Vue 3 Composables
articles.excerpt: Practical type-safe patterns for building reusable composables — generic refs, conditional return types, and how to type provide/inject without losing your mind.

articles.title: Performance Auditing E-Commerce Frontends
articles.excerpt: A framework for identifying and fixing performance bottlenecks in large Vue/Nuxt e-commerce sites — from LCP optimization to JavaScript bundle surgery.
